name: Break the curriculum.ts ⇄ language-curriculum.ts import cycle (extract ensureDefaultBook)
description: Cycle: curriculum.ts:59 imports regenerateLanguageCurriculum from ./language-curriculum (called :2391 four_strands branch); language-curriculum.ts:9 imports ensureDefaultBook from ./curriculum (called :405). Both edges are RUNTIME VALUE imports (import type won't help). Approved cut (operator decomposition 2026-06-13): extract ensureDefaultBook (~25-line pure DB upsert, no curriculum logic) into curriculum-core.ts; re-point the 3 internal callers in curriculum.ts + the caller in language-curriculum.ts. Smallest surgical cut, no behavior change. NOT on the identity-cutover surface.
acceptanceCriteria: Runtime import cycle between apps/api/src/services/curriculum.ts and language-curriculum.ts is broken: ensureDefaultBook extracted to a new module (e.g. curriculum-core.ts), both files import it one-directionally, neither imports the other. Cycle-check (madge/grep) confirms no cycle. All curriculum + language-curriculum tests green; no behavioral change.
